raw_title: Build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
raw_content: In this post, you learn how to build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that helps your finance team manage AWS costs across multiple accounts. This conversational agent consolidates data from AWS Cost Explorer, AWS Budgets, and AWS Compute Optimizer into a single interface, so your team can ask questions like "What are my top cost drivers this month?" and receive immediate answers.
